description: Composition Purple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short puffed sleeves, collection badge on the left waist and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print The cute statement simply zooms high when you dress your little girl in this purple t-shirt from the Bee Born collection of doodle. Dress her in this cute tee and simply fly in the happiness she’s filled you with, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts or capris and sandals for that ultimate baby-girl look.
